_doc: Hand-ordered, declarative task-class -> local builder model. Read at claim time by loop/claim-task.sh; run-loop.sh runs whatever model lands in .claim-model. Edit by hand when your gut says a model changed - it is deliberately NOT self-mutating (see the spec: a self-reordering scorecard is noise at single-developer volume). Tag a task with `class:<name>` in Auto Tasks.md; absent -> default_class. Unknown class -> fallback_model.
